heading: Findings by jury; costs
label: 32 Findings by jury; costs
text: If, in any action brought pursuant to , title to the ground in controversy shall not be established by either party, the jury shall so find, and judgment shall be entered according to the verdict. In such case costs shall not be allowed to either party, and the claimant shall not proceed in the land office or be entitled to a patent for the ground in controversy until he shall have perfected his title.section 30 of this title
